title: xyris pratensis
intro: Xyris pratensis, also known as yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Xyris pratensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, and it can also be used topically in the form of creams or salves to treat skin conditions.
